title: Dinosaur Activity Case | Dinosaur Activity Book | Dinosaur Stickers |Dinosaur Toys | Dinosaur Gifts for Boys | Dinosaur Play Sets | Kids Activities (Colour and Carry Activity Kit)
features: EASY TO CARRY AND SHOW CREATIVITY: This entertaining kit is really simple to carry, with everything included in a single sturdy, customisable carry case, whether you are at home or travelling. Allows your children to express their inner artist by completing the dinosaur themed activity and colouring books and bringing fun to their school activity, home, family gathering, or holiday.

GREAT FOR KIDS AGES 6 - 9 YEARS: This is the perfect for children aged 6 to 9 years, the sturdy case is packed full of dinosaur themed activities and stationery that is perfect for using with friends or alone. This creative activity kit is suitable for kids aged 6 to 9 years and the simple but fun activities included can help improve children's concentration and build a sense of personal improvement.

SCREEN FREE AND STRESS-FREE ACTIVITY: This is a perfect activity kit to keep little dinosaur fans away from their phones and TV screen and into the creative world. This fun activity case will also redirect their attention away from daily life and into a creative mindset, which is beneficial for a healthy lifestyle.

EDUCATIONAL ENGAGEMENT: The customisable color-in-carry case encourages children's creativity by allowing them to colour and design the dinosaurs on the case so it is unique for them. Engage children in learning and colouring with dinosaurs from prehistoric times, potentially generating an interest in palaeontology and history through hands-on colouring and exploration.

COMPLETE FUN ACTIVITY SET: This Dinosaur activity case comes with 1 x 32-page colouring book, 1 x 32-page activity book, 2 x sticker sheets, 10 x felt-tip pens, 5 x dual-ended colouring pencils, and 2 x gel pens and 1 x sturdy carry case.
description: Calling all dinosaur enthusiasts! The Bookoli Dinosaur Fun Activity Case is the ultimate boredom-busting activity set. This deluxe kit includes a 32-page colouring book, a 32-page learning book, two sticker sheets, ten felt-tip pens, five dual-ended colouring pencils and two gel pens - everything you need to unleash your creativity and keep yourself entertained for hours. All of this comes packed in a durable and customisable carry-case adorned with an eye-catching dinosaur design that can be coloured-in to make it completely unique to you. Perfect for on-the-go entertainment, this kit makes an excellent gift for anyone who loves these prehistoric creatures. With the Bookoli Dinosaur Fun Activity Case, unleash your imagination and embark on a Jurassic adventure!
